TableName.description: The name of the table to create. Must be between 3 and 255 characters long.

AttributeDefinitions.description: An array of attributes that describe the key schema for the table and indexes

KeySchema.description: Specifies the attributes that make up the primary key for a table or an index

BillingMode.description: Controls how you are charged for read and write throughput

GlobalSecondaryIndexes.description: One or more global secondary indexes to create on the table

LocalSecondaryIndexes.description: One or more local secondary indexes to create on the table

Tags.description: Tags to associate with the table

TableClass.description: The table class of the new table

DeletionProtectionEnabled.description: Indicates whether deletion protection is enabled
